# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- All UI texts must be properly localized and consistent for German and English.
- Language settings should not use redirects; prefer cookie-based i18n handling.
- The site/product name has changed to **PrompToMars** and should be updated everywhere in the codebase. Use CamelCase brand spelling exactly as **PrompToMars** throughout the codebase, including related email/domain references where they are part of the visible branding.

## Project-Specific Rules
- The user wants admin login to use Supabase Auth instead of a custom local admin credential flow. For admin access in this project, it is sufficient if the Supabase user email is denis.manteufel@gmail.com.
